project_privacy_data_flows.description: User opens a Wikipedia article. Page content, images, and metadata loaded from MediaWiki API. Reading history entry created locally.

flow_steps.code: fun newIntent(context: Context, entry: HistoryEntry, title: PageTitle): Intent
flow_steps.details: User taps a search result, link, or feed card. PageActivity launched with PageTitle and HistoryEntry.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=parse&prop=text&mobileformat=1") suspend fun parsePage(@Query("page") pageTitle: String): MwParseResponse
flow_steps.details: Article wikitext parsed via MediaWiki parse API. Title sent as query parameter.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&prop=info|description|pageimages&pilicense=any") suspend fun getInfoByPageIdsOrTitles(@Query("pageids") pageIds: String? = null, @Query("titles") titles: String? = null)
flow_steps.details: Article metadata (description, images, coordinates) fetched from query API.

flow_steps.code: @Entity(indices = [Index(value = ["lang", "namespace", "apiTitle"])]) class HistoryEntry(var authority: String = "", var lang: String = "", var apiTitle: String = "", ...)
flow_steps.details: Page view recorded as HistoryEntry and persisted to Room database. Stores page title, language, namespace, and timestamp.
Article content loaded into WebView with offline caching via OkHttp interceptors.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: User shares a Wikipedia article URL to external apps via Android share intent. Article URL with provenance parameter sent to chosen app.

flow_steps.code: fun shareText(context: Context, title: PageTitle, withProvenance: Boolean = true) { shareText(context, StringUtil.fromHtml(title.displayText).toString(), UriUtil.getUrlWithProvenance(context, title, R.string.prov_share_link)) }
flow_steps.details: User taps share icon. Article URL with tracking provenance and title prepared for sharing.

flow_steps.code: fun shareText(context: Context, subject: String, text: String) { val shareIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND); shareIntent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_SUBJECT, subject); shareIntent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, text); shareIntent.type = "text/plain"; context.startActivity(chooserIntent) }
flow_steps.details: Article URL and title sent to external app via Android Intent. Data leaves Wikipedia app boundary.
